action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline U-Net (7.8M params, base_ch=64) achieved Z500 RMSE=568.6, still improving at epoch 10. Analysis: Main bottlenecks are model capacity and training duration. 7.8M is tiny vs 1B limit. Decision: Scale model to base_ch=192 (~70M params), add SE attention and bottleneck self-attention, train 40 epochs with stride=1 (2x data), AdamW, warmup+cosine LR, channel-weighted loss (Z500 weight=2), longitude augmentation, EMA weights, and gradient clipping.
